Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: V. Mack/M. Vallejo, CSR: Janet Pond
Appearances:
Harold Auerback, Esq. for Plaintiff Textron Financial Corporation, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Cole Valley Software, Inc., and Jeffrey L. Reade.
Principal/Damages of $34,980.31
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $290.50
Interest of $4,109.82 For the total of $41,880.63.
Judgment signed in open court.
